CustomField.description: Substantive modification category per the Farber-Carlarne academic rubric. Partial Modification: change to one aspect of the preferred alternative or mitigation plan. Addition/Removal: a project element added or removed in response to comments. New Alternative: an entirely new preferred alternative created in response to comments. Non-Substantive: text clarification or editorial change only — no decision impact.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Partial Modification, Addition/Removal, New Alternative, or Non-Substantive. Required for agency responsiveness reporting.
CustomField.label: Modification Type

value.label: Partial Modification
value.description: Change to one aspect of the preferred alternative or mitigation plan (e.g., reduced buffer zone, modified construction schedule, new mitigation measure).

value.label: Addition/Removal
value.description: A project element was added to or removed from the proposed action in direct response to public comment (e.g., removal of a pipeline segment, addition of a noise barrier).

value.label: New Alternative
value.description: An entirely new preferred alternative was created or selected in response to public comments. Highest tier of responsiveness.

value.label: Non-Substantive
value.description: Text edit, formatting correction, or clarification with no change to the underlying decision or mitigation plan.
